instruction: Reset the position of the red X mark on the hashtag icon. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/hashtag.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 8.25h15m-16.5 7.5h15m-1.8-13.5-3.9 19.5m-2.1-19.5-3.9 19.5"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,24 112,36 106,30 112,24 100,36" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/hashtag.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 8.25h15m-16.5 7.5h15m-1.8-13.5-3.9 19.5m-2.1-19.5-3.9 19.5"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
</svg>
